import { useState } from "react"; import { useNavigate } from "react-router-dom"; import api from "../api"; export default function CreateEvent() { const [form, setForm] = useState({ title: "", description: "", date: "", venue: "", image: "", category: "", coordinator: "", email: "", featured: false }); const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false); const navigate = useNavigate(); const submit = async (e) => { e.preventDefault(); setLoading(true); try { await api.post("/events", form); alert("✅ Event created successfully!"); navigate("/dashboard"); } catch (err) { alert("❌ Failed to create event"); } finally { setLoading(false); } }; return (

✨ Create New Event

Fill in the details to create an amazing event

setForm({...form, title:e.target.value})} required />
setForm({...form, date:e.target.value})} required />
setForm({...form, venue:e.target.value})} required />
setForm({...form, image:e.target.value})} required /> Tip: Use Unsplash or similar for high-quality images
setForm({...form, email:e.target.value})} />
